faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants in my Flatlands home?
faqs.answer: Look for large black or dark brown ants (especially in spring), piles of sawdust-like material near wooden areas, faint rustling sounds in walls, and small holes in wood. Flatlands homes with mature trees or moisture issues are particularly susceptible. Our technicians provide free inspections to confirm carpenter ant activity.
